root_cause: TTD is a Vue.js Single Page Application with a Django backend. All attempted REST API URL patterns (/api/ttd/target, /api/ttd/drug, /api/v1/target, /rest/target/search, etc.) return Django 404 debug pages. The website renders HTML for all routes including /search/targetResult and /data/target/details/. No Swagger/OpenAPI documentation exists. Data is available only as downloadable flat files (TSV/TXT) at /data/upload/summary/TTD_download.html, not through a REST API.
workaround: Use existing tools: Open Targets (60+ tools for target-drug-disease associations), DGIdb (4 tools for drug-gene interactions), ChEMBL (29 tools for target/drug data), Pharos (4 tools for druggable genome). TTD target data is also cross-referenced in these databases.
workaround_tool_file: Already covered by opentarget_tools.json, dgidb_tools.json, chembl_tools.json, pharos_tools.json
investigation_notes: All /api/ routes return Django debug 404 page
No JSON Content-Type returned from any endpoint
Website appears to be a Vue.js frontend with no public REST API backend
TTD data is available as downloadable flat files (TSV format) but not via REST
